boardTitleColumn: Include board title? (not recommended re privacy)
classCode: Class Code (see URL when visiting class)

errors.formatUnsupported: Only CSV exports are available at this time.
errors.missingBoardId: Please provide a Board ID before running the export.
errors.missingClassCode: Please provide a Class Code before running the export.
errors.missingClassId: Please provide a Class ID before running the export.
errors.noBoardForId: No board found for that identifier. Double-check it and try again.
errors.noBoardsAfterOwnershipFilter: No proposal boards matched the current ownership filter.
errors.noBoardsForScope: No boards matched the selected status scope.
errors.noClassForId: No class found for that identifier. Double-check it and try again.
errors.noDatasetSelected: Select at least one dataset (board or reviews).
errors.noProposalsForClass: This class does not currently have any linked student proposal boards.
errors.noResearchAccess: You need research-level permissions to access the export tools
errors.noStudentOwnedBoards: This class has proposal boards, but none are owned by enrolled students (no student collaborators). Try switching to 'All class boards' or linking boards to students.

intro: Pull proposal content and review data directly from the MindHive platform. Choose the class, pick your data scope, and export downloadable CSV files formatted for analysis.
noResearchAccess: You need research-level permissions to access the export tools

ownership.perClassHelper: Export every proposal board attached to this class, including pilots/template boards.
ownership.perClassLabel: All proposal boards for this class
ownership.perStudentHelper: Only export boards where at least one collaborator is an enrolled student.

policies.boardSelection: Boards are pulled from Class.studentProposals. By default we prioritise each enrolled student's isMain board; if one is missing, we fall back to a submitted board. You can use the ownership filter above to include all class boards, including pilots/template boards not owned by enrolled students.
policies.exportFormatChoice: You can choose between long and wide export formats: long format outputs one row per board section card, while wide format flattens each board to a single row with many columns.
policies.exportIncludes: Proposal content exports include plain-text cards, comments, review flags, linked resources, and the class collaborators attached to each board.
policies.exportReviews: Reviews export each response separately, respecting the same stage + status filters (Not Started, In Progress, Submitted, Finished).
policies.exportZip: Selected datasets are bundled into a single ZIP archive for download.

selectAllBoards: Select 'All boards' if you want no filters
selectNoStatusFilter: Select 'No status filter' if you want no filters

summary.nonStudentOwnedBoards: {{count}} additional board{{suffix}} not owned by enrolled students (pilots/template boards)

workflowStage: Select which stage to filter by

metrics.pageIntro: Review platform usage counts by class. Filter by class network, inspect student, study, and board metrics, and export results as CSV.
metrics.title: Platform metrics
metrics.intro: Filter classes by network and review platform counts per class.
metrics.allClassesWarning: Loading all classes may take longer on large platforms. Prefer a class network when possible.
metrics.networkDisabledHint: Network filter is disabled while a single class is selected.
metrics.classDisabledHint: Class filter is disabled while a class network is selected.
metrics.searchClassPlaceholder: Filter by class code or title

errors.noNetwork: Select a class network, choose a class, or choose 'All classes' before loading metrics.
errors.noResults: No classes matched the current filters.
